content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Little Alawn's Puzzle". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1534/C
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains an integer n, the number of elements in the array. The second line of each test case contains n space-separated integers.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the minimum number of operations required to make all elements of the array equal.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

code.Python3:
import sys
for _ in range(int(input())):
    n = int(input())
    arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
    arr.sort()
    min_val = arr[0]
    sum_val = sum(abs(x - min_val) for x in arr)
    print(sum_val)
